summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. No GitHub mutations planned; merge, fix, raise_pr, and low-signal closeout are disabled. The shard is not a dedupe cluster, so each listed PR is classified independently from the hydrated preflight artifact. Security-sensitive PRs are quarantined with exact-ref route_security actions.

actions.reason: Open PR appears independently actionable, but hydrated updated_at is unavailable in the compacted artifact, so only a conservative non-mutating classification is safe.
Exact candidate is marked security-sensitive in the authoritative preflight artifact.
